title: Voluntary Housing Refund
text:
Voluntary Housing Refund - SupportGoWhere
Voluntary Housing Refund
Share link
Allows you to return any CPF savings used for your home purchase to your CPF account while still owning your property. Doing so reduces the refund amount you would have to make and increases the cash proceeds you would get when you eventually sell or transfer your property. This also boosts your retirement savings as you can benefit from CPF interest rates.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Enjoy higher retirement payouts with CPF interest rates
Greater cash proceeds and lower required CPF refund upon property sale or transfer
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

Receive more cash proceeds and refund less to your CPF account when selling or transferring your property

Take advantage of CPF’s interest rates and retire with more

Re-use CPF savings for the various CPF approved schemes if needed

Who is this for?

You have used your Ordinary Account (OA) savings to purchase your property

Please note the following conditions when making the voluntary housing refund:

You may refund up to the CPF principal amount withdrawn towards the property plus its accrued interest to your CPF account

If you are an undischarged bankrupt, you have to obtain the Official Assignee’s approval to make this housing refund

While housing grants will generally be refunded to your OA if you have an HDB flat, the grant(s) may be partially credited to your Special Account / Retirement Account and MediSave Account if you have received $30,000 or more in grant(s)

If you are 55 and above, the refunded amount will be used to meet your Full Retirement Sum (FRS), which supports your retirement needs through monthly payouts

Any refunds that exceed your cohort’s FRS will remain in your OA

You may read more on housing refunds and their processes

How to apply?

Log in to my cpf digital services using your Singpass:

Choose your property and enter a refund amount

Or

Use the CPF Mobile app:

Download the CPF Mobile app

Log in with your Singpass

Tap on 'Services'

Choose 'Voluntary Housing Refund'

Where can I find help?

View more details

CPF hotline: 1800-227-1188

To avoid waiting on the line, you may book an appointment here.

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Visit your nearest branch

Note: By appointment only

Scheme last updated 10 Mar 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
